experimental.title: Rotation-flip detector (Improving/Leading -> Weakening/Peaking) as a state-transition timing layer
experimental.note: Method: flag any sector crossing out of a strong quad (Leading->Peaking / Improving->Weakening) with negative acceleration on a fresh bar, then event-study forward 5/10-day sector return conditioned on whether the next scheduled catalyst confirms or denies the roll. THIS RUN the detector flags an XLV->XLE hand-off: XLV Weakening (quad W, accel -2.44, rsMom6m -4.94, rsMom 99.16) rolling out while XLE Leading (quad L, accel +2.3, rsMom 102.67, rsMom6m +12.93) rotates in, with leader XLK only Lagging (quad A, accel +0.13, rsMom1m -5.43) and no clean Leading GICS sector - a DEFENSIVE(healthcare)->CYCLICAL(energy) hand-off (a risk-on roll, unlike a prior intra-cyclical XLI->XLE reshuffle), but XLE MA stack is still tangled (+12.48% >200d), so it is actionable as a tilt yet flagged for persistence per anti-whipsaw. The value is the state-transition TIMING, which no owning tool persists today. Inputs: per-sector rsRatio/rsMom/accel/quad history across distinct market-bar dates + each sector's next dated catalyst + realized forward return.

experimental.title: Cross-tool haven-abstinence x sector-rotation risk-on gate (FIRES this run - defensive-out leg now satisfied)
experimental.note: Method: on each fresh bar, cross the real-assets monetary-haven leg against the sector-RRG rotation vector - declare a 'clean risk-on' state only when (a) BOTH monetary havens are in downtrends AND (b) a defensive sector is rotating out while a cyclical rotates in with no clean Leading defensive; then event-study forward bench drift conditioned on the joint state vs either half alone. THIS RUN the state DOES fire: the haven leg is satisfied - GLD 10.6 and SLV 0 both Downtrend (mom63 -16.64 / -29.35), IBIT 21.2 and BTC-USD 36.2 both Downtrend, no haven bid - AND the sector roll is now defensive-to-cyclical (XLV healthcare rotating OUT, rrgState Weakening, accel -2.44 -> XLE energy rotating IN, rrgState Leading, accel +2.3) with no clean Leading defensive, so leg (b) is met. Distinguishes a broad defensive-to-cyclical risk-on turn (this run) from an intra-cyclical reshuffle (a prior run, where the same haven leg fired but XLI->XLE left leg (b) unmet). Inputs: real-assets GLD/SLV/IBIT/BTC-USD trend+mom63, sector per-name rrgState/rotation/accel with GICS defensive/cyclical tag, bench MA-stack; needs a persisted prior-bar snapshot to compute the state-transition delta across distinct market-bar dates.
